message:
fix(engine): deterministic content hashing — length-prefix fields and sort collections before computing digests

Multiple subsystems computed content hashes by concatenating variable-length
string fields without delimiters, making it possible for adjacent field values
to collide (e.g., "ab"+"cd" == "a"+"bcd"). Collections were hashed in
insertion order, producing different digests for semantically identical data.

Length-prefixed hashing (transport_certificate_ledger, cold_start_aot_governance,
evidence_ledger):
- Prepend 8-byte little-endian length before every variable-length field
- Hash GovernanceVerdict structurally (discriminant + contents) instead of
  via Display, which lost Blocked reasons and Rollback triggers

Sorted collection hashing (extension_registry, frankenlab_surface_gap_matrix,
oracle_release_gate, parser_multi_engine_harness, seqlock_candidate_inventory):
- Sort capabilities by name, artifacts by path, evaluations by condition_id,
  engines by engine_id, retry/comparator rows by candidate_id, and gap matrix
  cells by surface+capability before feeding into hashers

Additional fixes:
- synthesis_kernel_promotion: include decision variant Debug repr in hash
- acquisition_experiment_oracle, counterfactual_intervention_planner:
  normalize COMPONENT names (hyphens → underscores) for consistent hashing
- frankenlab_surface_gap_matrix: safer CapabilityId Display using match
  instead of unwrap_or_default

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -996,19 +996,20 @@ fn build_boundary_node_id(boundary: &BoundaryCaptureRecord) -> String {
 }
 
 fn build_artifact_node_id(entry: &EvidenceEntry, artifact: &ArtifactRecord) -> String {
-    format!(
-        "anode-{}",
-        deterministic_hash(
-            format!(
-                "{}:{}:{}:{}",
-                entry.entry_id,
-                artifact.artifact_id,
-                artifact.artifact_kind,
-                artifact.artifact_hash
-            )
-            .as_str(),
-        )
-    )
+    // Length-prefix each field to prevent delimiter collisions when fields
+    // contain the ':' separator character.
+    let canonical = format!(
+        "{}|{}:{}|{}:{}|{}:{}|{}",
+        entry.entry_id.len(),
+        entry.entry_id,
+        artifact.artifact_id.len(),
+        artifact.artifact_id,
+        artifact.artifact_kind.len(),
+        artifact.artifact_kind,
+        artifact.artifact_hash.len(),
+        artifact.artifact_hash
+    );
+    format!("anode-{}", deterministic_hash(&canonical))
 }
